description: thrIVE Phase A-1 system-wide deployable montage. Standard 32-channel 10-20 layout; a-priori anatomical selection (NOT data-driven). Subset of the PhysioNet EEGMMIDB 64-channel BCI2000 montage.
source_dataset: PhysioNet EEGMMIDB (Schalk et al. 2004), 64-channel BCI2000 montage
applies_to: Phase A-1 factorial thrIVE/JEPA/GL arms. A-0 preflight and the R_FM arm retain the full 64-channel montage.
casing_note: Names follow MNE/MOABB standard; channels= performs exact matching.
